title: carpinus lipoensis
intro: Carpinus lipoensis, also known as the Sichuan hop hornbeam, is a deciduous shrub native to China's Sichuan and Guizhou provinces. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Carpinus lipoensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to relieve fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions that are used to treat various ailments, including coughs, colds, and digestive issues.
